verses.text: This is the covenant in Moab; yet they lack a heart to perceive. The covenant. Understanding is God's gift.
This is the covenant in Moab; yet they lack a heart to perceive. The covenant. Understanding is God's gift.
This is the covenant in Moab; yet they lack a heart to perceive. The covenant. Understanding is God's gift.
This is the covenant in Moab; yet they lack a heart to perceive. The covenant. Understanding is God's gift.
God led them forty years, their clothes unworn. Provided. He cared all the way.
God led them forty years, their clothes unworn. Provided. He cared all the way.
God led them forty years, their clothes unworn. Provided. He cared all the way.
God led them forty years, their clothes unworn. Provided. He cared all the way.
All stand to enter the covenant, that He may be their God. Entered. The bond is sworn.
All stand to enter the covenant, that He may be their God. Entered. The bond is sworn.
All stand to enter the covenant, that He may be their God. Entered. The bond is sworn.
All stand to enter the covenant, that He may be their God. Entered. The bond is sworn.
All stand to enter the covenant, that He may be their God. Entered. The bond is sworn.
The covenant binds those present and those not yet born. All. It reaches future generations.
The covenant binds those present and those not yet born. All. It reaches future generations.
They saw the idols of the nations they passed. Warned. Idolatry is a snare.
They saw the idols of the nations they passed. Warned. Idolatry is a snare.
Let none turn away, lest a root of bitterness spring up. Beware. Secret sin defiles.
Let none turn away, lest a root of bitterness spring up. Beware. Secret sin defiles.
Let none turn away, lest a root of bitterness spring up. Beware. Secret sin defiles.
Let none turn away, lest a root of bitterness spring up. Beware. Secret sin defiles.
The land shall be a desolation, and nations ask why. Desolation. Sin's end is plain.
The land shall be a desolation, and nations ask why. Desolation. Sin's end is plain.
The land shall be a desolation, and nations ask why. Desolation. Sin's end is plain.
The answer: they forsook the covenant, so God cast them out. Forsaken. Apostasy brings exile.
The answer: they forsook the covenant, so God cast them out. Forsaken. Apostasy brings exile.
The answer: they forsook the covenant, so God cast them out. Forsaken. Apostasy brings exile.
The answer: they forsook the covenant, so God cast them out. Forsaken. Apostasy brings exile.
'The secret things belong unto the LORD'; the revealed are ours. Revealed. Obey what God has shown.
